Title: JupyterLab: Stored XSS in extension manager through package metadata unsanitized URI protocol
Description: A malicious PyPI package can place a `javascript:` URL in its `[project.urls]` metadata. JupyterLab's Extension Manager renders this as the extension's home-page link without validating the protocol, so a user who clicks the extension name executes attacker-controlled JavaScript in the JupyterLab origin.
